meta.purpose: Capability stages for content strategy — from topic generator to worthiness filter.
meta.load_condition: Load when user asks about improving content strategy.

stages.name: Topic Generator
stages.description: Generates lists of content ideas by combining keywords. Measures success by quantity. Does not filter for worthiness.
indicators: Does not mention audience specificity or cognitive contrast

stages.name: Worthiness Filter
stages.description: Filters every topic through audience specificity, cognitive contrast, discussability, and comprehension barrier. Recommends fewer, sharper topics with specific reasoning.
indicators: Explains why each topic passes or fails each criterion
Identifies the specific person and situation for each topic

evolution_layers.name: From generation to filtering
evolution_layers.capability: Stop generating more topics. Start filtering every topic for worthiness before recommending.

measurement.what: Percentage of content strategy sessions where the agent filters topics (removes weak ones) rather than only generating (adding more)
measurement.how: Review agent output: does it include rejection reasoning for some topics, or only positive recommendations?
measurement.threshold: > 80% of sessions include at least one rejected topic with specific reasoning
